---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "mermaid"
namespace: "Report"
description: "Generates a network from mermaid code"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `mermaid`  
Namespace: `report`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/report/mermaid)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/report/mermaid)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/report/mermaid/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/report/mermaid).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/report/mermaid/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                 |Description                                                                                                                 |Attributes                                         |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`            |Input directory                                                                                                             |`file`, required                                   |
|`--output`           |Generated network as output.                                                                                                |`file`, required, example: `"output.png"`          |
|`--output_format`    |Output format for the generated image. By default will be inferred from the extension  of the file specified with --output. |`string`                                           |
|`--width`            |Width of the page                                                                                                           |`integer`, default: `800`                          |
|`--height`           |Height of the page                                                                                                          |`integer`, default: `600`                          |
|`--background_color` |Background color for pngs/svgs (not pdfs)                                                                                   |`string`, default: `"white"`, example: `"#F0F0F0"` |

## Authors


  * Dries De Maeyer [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ddemaeyer) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814) (maintainer)
